title: Pioneer Generation Disability Assistance Scheme (PioneerDAS)
text:
Pioneer Generation Disability Assistance Scheme (PioneerDAS) - SupportGoWhere
Pioneer Generation Disability Assistance Scheme (PioneerDAS)
Share link
Honours what Singapore's Pioneers have done for the country and provides Pioneers with moderate or severe functional disabilities with cash assistance for everyday expenses.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Cash payouts of $100 per month for expenses
Processing time takes up to 6 weeks for online applications
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Cash payouts of $100 per month for expenses

Who is this for?

Must be a Pioneer. Check your loved one's Pioneer status via:

LifeSG App: Pioneers can view their Pioneer Generation (PG) e-card after logging in.

Singpass Mobile App: Seniors may log on to their SingPass mobile app to view their eligibility status.

View MOH website for more information

Lives in Singapore

Always requires some assistance on a permanent basis with at least 3 of the 6 Activities of Daily Living (ADLs)

The 6 ADLs are:

Eating

Bathing

Dressing

Transferring

Toileting

Walking or moving around

How to apply?

You can apply:

Online at the AIC eService Portal

At any of the AIC Links

You'll need to provide:

Functional Assessment Report from your General Practitioner

NRIC details

Bank details

Where can I find help?

View more details

AIC Hotline: 1800 650 6060

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 03 Oct 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
